label: 404_UI_Anxiety_Loop
context: User sees a 404 page in OpenClaw Dashboard/Webchat.
trap_path: Assume system failure -> Send repeated instructions (e.g., 'switch model') to force response.
cost: High token waste, UI queue buildup, amplified user anxiety.
escape: Hard refresh browser (Cmd+R) or check 'Overview' tab; check if Chrome plugin badge is green.
